fields.l: bonus with 1× at ★10 (only if differs from b)
fields.c2: bonus with 2× at ★0 (only if not exactly 2×b)
fields.c3: bonus with 3× at ★0 (only if not exactly 3×b)

cross_fields.synergy: additional bonus beyond sum of individual bonuses
